title: Power Client
description: Power Client is a work-in-progress modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 that is full of optimization modifications to help boost frames and adds useful settings.
body:
![Power Client by pvrz includes performance, extra settings, tweaks, and more.](https://i.imgur.com/yHyOIkh.png)

**Power Client** is a large modpack by [pvrz](https://modrinth.com/user/pvrz) for Minecraft 1.20.1 that adds performance tweaks to help boost frames (such as Sodium, Leaf Culling, Dynamic FPS, etc.) and useful settings (Borderless Fullscreen, extra Sodium QoL settings, Mod Menu, etc.) to help make Minecraft a more enjoyable experience.

Any issues should be reported on the [github](https://github.com/pvrzz/powercli/issues) issue page.

<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds)
- [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)
- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/version/fabric-1.20.1-2.5.17) **[v0.2+]**
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)
- [Defulib](https://modrinth.com/mod/deftulib)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix/version/5.18.1+mc1.20.1) **[v0.2+]**
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [Particle Blocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/particles)
- [Raknetify](https://modrinth.com/mod/raknetify)
- [Reese's Sodium Settings](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Screencapper](https://modrinth.com/mod/screencapper)
- [Shut Up GL Error](https://modrinth.com/mod/shut-up-gl-error)
- [Skip Transitions](https://modrinth.com/mod/skip-transitions)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/version/fabric-1.20.1-2.5.17) **[v0.2+]**
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight)
- [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak)
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)
- [Video Tape](https://modrinth.com/mod/videotape)
- [Yet Another Config Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
</details>
